overview: Xution Video is a powerful browser-based layered video composition tool with gold and black theming. It features a canvas preview with play/pause controls, background image/video layer, 4 picture-in-picture slots with crop/resize/position controls, 4 audio tracks, affirmations overlay with text-to-speech, binary code overlay with audio beeps, static noise effects, isochronic tone generator, and WAV/MP4 export.
features: Background image/video upload with duration control
4 PiP layers with crop, resize, position, opacity, and timing
4 audio tracks with volume and auto-looping
Affirmations overlay with Web Speech API TTS
Binary code overlay with Morse-style audio beeps
Static noise visual and white noise audio
